# Waller Media

> Waller Media is the on-camera coaching and video production practice of Derick Waller, a five-time Emmy Award-winning broadcast journalist based in New York City. Waller Media pairs Emmy-winning on-camera coaching with premium video production for executives, attorneys, and nonprofit leaders — one expert, one process, from first rehearsal to final delivered video.

## About

Derick Waller is a five-time Emmy Award-winning broadcast journalist and the founder of Waller Media. He is based in New York City and works with executives, law firms, and nonprofit leaders. Waller Media's category-defining offering is pairing on-camera coaching with premium video production from a single expert, rather than requiring clients to hire a media trainer and a separate production company.

## Services

- **The Virtual Intensive** — Rapid, high-impact on-camera coaching, message mapping, and mock interview critiques via a secure virtual studio. Ideal prep for LinkedIn video, depositions, press interviews, and keynotes.
- **The On-Camera Masterclass** — A full-day, in-person media training intensive. A professional closed-door broadcast set is brought to the client for real-time video critique and performance shaping.
- **The Thought Leadership Engine (signature package)** — Deep media training combined with a premium, multi-camera video production shoot, delivering a full suite of broadcast-ready marketing assets.

## Pricing

Corporate and executive investments start at $2,500. Every engagement begins with a consultation to scope goals, timeline, and deliverables; there is no fixed ceiling on scope.
